name: Cortex XDR
description: Monitor endpoints, incidents, and alerts in Palo Alto Cortex XDR for endpoint detection and response

credentialFields.label: API FQDN
credentialFields.helpText: Your Cortex XDR API FQDN, e.g. api-YOURNAME.xdr.us.paloaltonetworks.com (no https:// prefix). Found in Settings > Configurations > Integrations > API Keys > View Examples.

credentialFields.label: API Key ID
credentialFields.helpText: The numeric ID of your API key. Found in Settings > Configurations > Integrations > API Keys.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: The API key value. Use a Standard security level key. Advanced keys require additional HMAC signing.

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Retrieves all endpoints managed by Cortex XDR and verifies their protection status

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Monitors Cortex XDR for active alerts and verifies alerting is functional

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Reviews incident response status in Cortex XDR to verify incidents are being managed and resolved
